eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Nevada; at 09:23 AM ON MAR 5, 2026 Effective until 05:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Amber alert out of North Las Vegas for 10-month-old Leilani Williams mixed Asian and black female. Victim may be with her father, Roderick Duke 40 years old 6'2 180 pounds in a Blue Chrysler 2017 model 200 unknown license plate. Incident reported as of 0140 March 5, 2026
 If you have any information about this incident, please contact The North Las Vegas Police Department at 911 or 702-633-9111.
